summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Hero Electricals landing page. All interactive elements working correctly including switchboard toggle, LED animations, socket footer interactions, navigation links, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with animated text 'Powering the Modern Spaces' and stats bar
Navbar with logo 'Hero Electricals' and all navigation links functional
Interactive switchboard toggle switches between retail and wholesale modes correctly
Background changes from light (#F8F9FA) to dark (#0A192F) when toggle clicked
Product cards update correctly in retail vs wholesale modes
LED section with tubelight element visible and animation triggers on scroll
Bento grid shows 6 product categories correctly
Brand marquee section visible and animating
Socket footer interaction works - clicking socket reveals 4 contact info cards
Contact info displays phone, address, email, working hours correctly
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Mobile responsive menu toggle works correctly
Hero CTA buttons 'Explore Products' and 'Get in Touch' functional
All data-testid attributes present and working for automated testing
